fields.chunk_id: DEFINE FIELD chunk_id ON embeddings TYPE string PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.chunk_strategy: DEFINE FIELD chunk_strategy ON embeddings TYPE string PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.embedding: DEFINE FIELD embedding ON embeddings TYPE option<array<float>> PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.embedding[*]: DEFINE FIELD embedding[*] ON embeddings TYPE float PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.embedding_model: DEFINE FIELD embedding_model ON embeddings TYPE string PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.metadata: DEFINE FIELD metadata ON embeddings TYPE option<object> PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.schema_version: DEFINE FIELD schema_version ON embeddings TYPE string PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.text_hash: DEFINE FIELD text_hash ON embeddings TYPE string PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.vector_rowid: DEFINE FIELD vector_rowid ON embeddings TYPE int PERMISSIONS FULL

indexes.embeddings_strategy_chunk_model_idx: DEFINE INDEX embeddings_strategy_chunk_model_idx ON embeddings FIELDS chunk_strategy, chunk_id, embedding_model UNIQUE
indexes.embeddings_strategy_model_idx: DEFINE INDEX embeddings_strategy_model_idx ON embeddings FIELDS chunk_strategy, embedding_model
indexes.embeddings_text_hash_idx: DEFINE INDEX embeddings_text_hash_idx ON embeddings FIELDS text_hash
